CREATE TABLE test_dates_2 (id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates_2 VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-04-01 12:00:00')), (2, toDateTime('2023-06-01 12:00:00'));
SELECT t1.id, toStartOfYear(t1.event_date) AS year_start FROM test_dates_2 AS t1 WHERE t1.event_date >= toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT toStartOfYear(t1.event_date) FROM (SELECT event_date FROM test_dates_2 WHERE id = 1) AS t1;
SELECT t1.event_date, toStartOfYear(t2.event_date) FROM test_dates_2 AS t1 INNER JOIN test_dates_2 AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t1.event_date < t2.event_date;
SELECT toStartOfYear(toDateTime('1999-12-31 23:59:59')) AS last_day_of_1999, toStartOfYear(toDateTime('2000-01-01 00:00:00')) AS first_day_of_2000;
